description: Shows macOS notifications for Claude events (tmux only)

hooks.command: sh -c '[ -z "$TMUX" ] && exit 0; command -v terminal-notifier &>/dev/null || exit 0; notif_type=$(jq -r ".notification_type // \"unknown\""); case "$notif_type" in idle_prompt) terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code" -message "Session idle - awaiting input" -sound Ping &>/dev/null & ;; permission_prompt) terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code" -message "Permission required" -sound Ping &>/dev/null & ;; elicitation_dialog) terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code" -message "Input requested" -sound Ping &>/dev/null & ;; esac'
